name: keyGen
title: Key Pair Generator
description: Generate a new Ed25519 key pair. Optionally provide a seed (32-byte hex string), otherwise a secure random seed will be generated.

seed.description: Optional Ed25519 seed as 64 hex characters (32 bytes). If not provided, a secure random seed will be generated.
Hex encoded Ed25519 seed (32 bytes, 64 hex characters)
